utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Let’s check the final package one by one:

2. travel_dates – Included with specific dates (departure and return). ✅
3. transportation – Included with airline, class, airports, price, total cost, baggage, cancellation policy. Fully specified. ✅
4. accommodation – Included with name, type, location, cost, nights, room type, amenities. Fully specified. ✅
5. activities – Present with details: name, type, duration, prices, guide included. Fully specified. ✅
6. additional_services – Present with special requests, modification policy, change fee. Fully specified. ✅
7. total_budget – Present with total cost, currency, budget limit, remaining. Fully specified. ✅

All 7 items required in the format are included and fully specified.
